entries.statement: Ability to select appropriate technical tools, languages, and platforms for data and AI requirements, evaluating trade-offs between performance, maintainability, team capability, ecosystem maturity, and cost.

Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.

Ability to evaluate and adopt new technologies, frameworks, and tools for data and AI work, assessing maturity, community support, integration requirements, and organizational fit before recommending adoption.
Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requirements with long-term maintainability, scalability, and operational sustainability.

Ability to analyze data and AI systems holistically, understanding how changes in one component affect upstream and downstream dependencies, predicting system-level consequences of technical decisions, and designing for resilience across interconnected data pipelines and services.
entries.strm_gap_source: STRM-001-ONET: O*NET 2.B.4.g (Systems Analysis) — STS 0.371 to TF-A-002
